caption: In an office setting, three people are gathered around a desk. A man in a dark grey suit, light blue shirt, and a red patterned tie stands centrally, gesturing with his right hand while speaking. To his left, another man in a white shirt and tie looks up at him with a neutral expression. To the right, a woman with blonde hair pulled back, wearing a dark top, looks downward with a solemn expression. In the background, a computer monitor is visible against a plain wall with a framed picture. As the sequence progresses, the standing man continues to talk, his mouth opening and closing as he speaks, while his hand moves slightly. The man in the white shirt remains focused on the speaker, and the woman remains still and somber. The lighting is consistent throughout the scene, and no text or logos are visible.
